metadata.description: Plugins pessoais do Tiago para Claude Code

plugins.name: pbes
plugins.description: Plan Big, Execute Small — coordenador frontier + agents Sonnet (pbes-reader/pbes-editor) com arsenal de ~95 skills embutido (design, testing, debugging, planning, marketing, RE/security, DB). O coordenador delega e os workers carregam as skills do próprio plugin.
